title: Spain National (Long-Stay) Visa Application
description: Give the details for Spain's national (long-stay, Type D) visa application: the visa a non-EU/EEA/Swiss national needs before travelling to Spain for a stay exceeding the 90-day Schengen short-stay limit, for purposes including residence without a work permit, family reunification, employed or self-employed work, seasonal work, investment/entrepreneurship, study, internship, research, residence recovery, or accreditation. This document models the Ministerio de Asuntos Exteriores, Unión Europea y Cooperación's (MAEC) own 'Solicitud de visado nacional' / 'Application for a national visa' form, filed at the Spanish consulate with jurisdiction over the applicant's place of residence. The form's opening identity block (items 1-9) follows the same Schengen-harmonized personal-data numbering convention shared with Spain's own Schengen short-stay visa form and other EU member states' visa forms, but the remainder of the form (items 10-30) is genuinely Spain-specific: an 11-category residence-purpose taxonomy distinct from any other national visa form already in this registry, and three purpose-conditional data blocks (family-reunification sponsor, employer/company, educational establishment) with no counterpart in Germany's already-modelled de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application (see VERIFICATION.md for the full field-by-field duplicate-detection comparison). It does not model Spain's own Schengen (Type C) short-stay visa form, a confirmed field-for-field duplicate of the already-modelled fr/france-visas/schengen-visa-application, nor any purpose-specific supplementary annex (e.g. an investor/entrepreneur visa's own economic-activity plan, or a specific bilateral working-holiday agreement) a consulate may request in addition to this base form for a given purpose. It does not submit the application; the live source is always authoritative.

authority.name: Ministerio de Asuntos Exteriores, Unión Europea y Cooperación

source.documentRef: Solicitud de visado nacional / Application for a national visa (Spanish national long-stay visa application form, hosted directly by the Ministerio de Asuntos Exteriores and mirrored, byte-for-byte identical in content, across dozens of Spanish consulates' own subdomains worldwide)

verification.notes: GOV-1861: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, closing Spain's own explicitly-flagged 'open, unscreened backlog candidate' Visa gap (5th of 6 verticals). This cycle independently re-examined a prior cycle's (GOV-1652) screening note, which had characterized this same form as a field-for-field duplicate of de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application and set it aside; a fresh, direct field-by-field re-comparison against both the DE schema's own committed field list and the DE source PDF's own full text (fetched and re-extracted this cycle) found the two forms diverge sharply past their shared ~9-item Schengen-harmonized identity block -- the German form has no counterpart at all for this form's residence-purpose taxonomy or its family-reunification-sponsor, employer/company, or educational-establishment blocks, while the German form's own spouse/children/parents/previous-Germany-stays/health/criminal-history sections have no counterpart here. See VERIFICATION.md for the full side-by-side comparison. Authored on the corrected finding that this is a genuine, non-duplicate candidate.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Apellido(s) / Surname(s)

fields.name: surnameAtBirth
fields.label: Apellido(s) de nacimiento [apellido(s) anterior(es)] / Surname at birth (former surname(s))

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: Nombre(s) / First name(s)

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento (día-mes-año) / Date of birth

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Lugar de nacimiento / Place of birth

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: País de nacimiento / Country of birth

fields.name: currentNationality
fields.label: Nacionalidad actual / Current nationality

fields.name: nationalityAtBirth
fields.label: Nacionalidad de nacimiento, si difiere de la actual / Nationality at birth, if different

fields.name: otherNationalities
fields.label: Otras nacionalidades / Other nationalities

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sexo / Sex

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Estado civil / Marital status
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Soltero-a/Single, Casado-a/Married, Unión registrada/Registered union, Separado-a/Separated, Divorciado-a/Divorced, Viudo-a/Widow(er), Otros/Other (with a free-text specify line). These are seven independent AcroForm checkbox widgets, not a native radio-button group; modelled as a single enum since the form's own layout presents them as one mutually exclusive choice, per this registry's established convention for this widget class.

fields.name: otherMaritalStatusDetails
fields.label: Estado civil -- Otros (especifíquese) / Marital status -- other (please specify)

fields.name: guardianDetails
fields.label: En caso de menores de edad: persona que ejerce la patria potestad o tutor legal / In the case of minors: parental authority or legal guardian (surname, first name, address if different from applicant's, phone number, e-mail address and nationality)
fields.description: A single free-text box collecting the legal guardian's full details, applicable only when the applicant is a minor. The form does not itself carry a separate 'is the applicant a minor?' checkbox to gate this field on, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state.

fields.name: nationalIdentityNumber
fields.label: Número de documento nacional de identidad, si procede / National identity number, where applicable

fields.name: travelDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de documento de viaje / Type of travel document
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Pasaporte ordinario/Ordinary passport, Pasaporte diplomático/Diplomatic passport, Pasaporte de servicio/Service passport, Pasaporte oficial/Official passport, Pasaporte especial/Special passport, Otro documento de viaje/Other (with a free-text specify line). Six independent AcroForm checkbox widgets, modelled as one enum per the same convention noted on maritalStatus.

fields.name: otherTravelDocumentTypeDetails
fields.label: Otro documento de viaje (especifíquese) / Other travel document (please specify)

fields.name: travelDocumentNumber
fields.label: Número del documento de viaje / Number of travel document

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfIssue
fields.label: Fecha de expedición / Date of issue

fields.name: travelDocumentValidUntil
fields.label: Válido hasta / Valid until

fields.name: travelDocumentIssuedBy
fields.label: Expedido por (país) / Issued by (country)

fields.name: homeAddressAndEmail
fields.label: Domicilio postal y dirección de correo electrónico del solicitante / Applicant's home address and e-mail address
fields.description: The source presents postal address and e-mail address as a single combined free-text box (one AcroForm field), not two separate boxes; modelled as one field rather than splitting a structure the source itself does not split.

fields.name: phoneNumbers
fields.label: Número(s) de teléfono / Telephone number(s)

fields.name: residesInCountryOtherThanNationality
fields.label: Residente en un país distinto del país de nacionalidad actual / Residence in a country other than the country of current nationality
fields.description: A genuine native AcroForm radio-button pair (No/Sí), unlike the independent-checkbox groups elsewhere on this form.

fields.name: residencePermitNumber
fields.label: Permiso de residencia o documento equivalente -- número / Residence permit or equivalent document -- number

fields.name: residencePermitValidUntil
fields.label: Permiso de residencia -- válido hasta / Residence permit -- valid until

fields.name: currentOccupation
fields.label: Profesión actual / Current occupation

fields.name: purposeOfJourney
fields.label: Motivo(s) del viaje / Purpose(s) of the journey
fields.description: The form's own 12-option checkbox list, Spain's own residence-purpose taxonomy: Residencia sin finalidad laboral (no habilita para trabajar)/Residence without a work permit; Residencia para reagrupación familiar/Family reunification; Residencia y trabajo por cuenta ajena/Residence and employment; Residencia y trabajo por cuenta propia/Residence and self-employment; Residencia y trabajo de temporada por cuenta ajena (max. 9 meses al ano)/Seasonal employment (max. 9 months/year); Inversor/Emprendedor/Investor-entrepreneur; Estudios/Study; Prácticas/Internship; Investigación (en el marco de un convenio de acogida firmado por un organismo de investigación)/Research (under a hosting agreement signed by a research body); Recuperación de la residencia/Residence recovery; Acreditación/Accreditation; Otros/Other (with a free-text specify line). Twelve independent AcroForm checkbox widgets, modelled as one enum per the same convention noted on maritalStatus. This taxonomy has no equivalent structure in de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application's own purpose enum (Employment/Study/Au-pair/Language course/Family reunion/Other) -- see VERIFICATION.md's duplicate-detection comparison.

fields.name: otherPurposeDetails
fields.label: Motivo del viaje -- Otros (especifíquese) / Purpose of journey -- other (please specify)

fields.name: intendedDateOfArrival
fields.label: Fecha prevista de entrada en España / Intended date of arrival in Spain

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequested
fields.label: Número de entradas que solicita / Number of entries requested
fields.description: Three independent AcroForm checkbox widgets (Una/Dos/Multiples entradas), modelled as one enum per the same convention noted on maritalStatus.

fields.name: addressInSpain
fields.label: Domicilio postal del solicitante en España / Applicant's address in Spain

fields.name: nieNumber
fields.label: Número de Identificación de Extranjero (NIE) / Foreigner Identity Number (NIE)
fields.description: Per the form's own footnote, only required when a prior ruling by the competent immigration authority (órgano de extranjería) has already authorized the applicant to reside or work in Spain -- the form does not gate this with a separate yes/no checkbox, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating that condition.

fields.name: extranjeriaResolutionNotificationDate
fields.label: Fecha de notificación de la resolución dictada por el órgano de extranjería competente / Date of notification of the ruling issued by the competent immigration authority
fields.description: Same conditional applicability as nieNumber (see its own description) -- left ungated for the same reason.

fields.name: sponsorFullName
fields.label: Apellidos y nombre del reagrupante / Surname and first name of the sponsor (family reunification)

fields.name: sponsorRelationship
fields.label: Parentesco (relación del solicitante con el reagrupante) / Family relationship (of the applicant with the sponsor)
fields.description: The form's own checkbox list: Cónyuge/Spouse, Pareja de hecho/Registered (de facto) partner, Hijo/a (del reagrupante o cónyuge)/Child (of the sponsor or spouse), Ascendiente de primer grado (del reagrupante o cónyuge) a su cargo/Dependent first-degree ascendant (of the sponsor or spouse), Persona dependiente sujeta a representación legal del reagrupante/Dependent person under the sponsor's legal representation, Otro (especifíquese)/Other (please specify). Six independent AcroForm checkbox widgets, modelled as one enum per the same convention noted on maritalStatus.

fields.name: otherSponsorRelationshipDetails
fields.label: Parentesco -- Otro (especifíquese) / Family relationship -- other (please specify)

fields.name: sponsorDateOfBirth
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento del reagrupante / Sponsor's date of birth

fields.name: sponsorNationality
fields.label: Nacionalidad del reagrupante / Sponsor's nationality

fields.name: sponsorTravelDocumentOrIdNumber
fields.label: Número de documento de viaje o del documento de identidad del reagrupante / Sponsor's travel document or identity document number

fields.name: sponsorAddress
fields.label: Dirección postal del reagrupante / Sponsor's postal address

fields.name: sponsorPhone
fields.label: Número(s) de teléfono del reagrupante / Sponsor's telephone number(s)

fields.name: sponsorEmail
fields.label: Dirección de correo electrónico del reagrupante / Sponsor's e-mail address

fields.name: employerOrCompanyContactName
fields.label: Apellidos y nombre del empleador o nombre de la empresa/institución y apellidos y nombre de la persona de contacto / Employer's or company's/institution's name and surname of the employer, or name of the company/institution and surname and first name of its contact person

fields.name: employerOrCompanyAddress
fields.label: Dirección postal del empleador o de la empresa/institución / Employer's or company's/institution's postal address

fields.name: employerOrCompanyPhone
fields.label: Número de teléfono del empleador o de la empresa/institución / Employer's or company's/institution's telephone number

fields.name: employerOrCompanyEmail
fields.label: Correo electrónico del empresario o de la empresa/institución / Employer's or company's/institution's e-mail address

fields.name: employerOrCompanyRepresentativeIdNumber
fields.label: Número de Identidad de Extranjero o Documento Nacional de Identidad del empleador o de la persona de contacto / Employer's or contact person's NIE or DNI number

fields.name: employerCompanyTaxId
fields.label: Código de Identificación Fiscal de la empresa / Company's Tax Identification Code (CIF)

fields.name: educationalEstablishmentName
fields.label: Nombre del centro de estudios o investigación / Name of the educational establishment or research centre

fields.name: educationalEstablishmentAddress
fields.label: Dirección postal del centro de estudios o investigación / Educational establishment's or research centre's postal address

fields.name: educationalEstablishmentPhone
fields.label: Número de teléfono del centro de estudios o investigación / Educational establishment's or research centre's telephone number

fields.name: educationalEstablishmentEmail
fields.label: Correo electrónico del centro de estudios o investigación / Educational establishment's or research centre's e-mail address

fields.name: studiesStartDate
fields.label: Fecha prevista de inicio de los estudios o investigación / Intended date of start of studies or research

fields.name: studiesEndDate
fields.label: Fecha prevista de finalización de los estudios o investigación / Intended date of end of studies or research

fields.name: minorHostName
fields.label: Apellidos y nombre de la persona que vaya a acoger al menor o nombre de la entidad de acogida / Surname and first name of the person hosting the minor, or name of the hosting entity
fields.description: Applies only to the temporary displacement of minors for educational purposes under a program promoted/financed by a public administration, non-profit association, foundation, or other entity other than the persons holding parental authority/guardianship. The form does not gate this block with its own checkbox distinct from purposeOfJourney, so it is left ungated rather than fabricating a condition the source does not state.

fields.name: minorHostAddress
fields.label: Dirección postal de la persona que vaya a acoger al menor o de la entidad de acogida / Postal address of the host person or hosting entity

fields.name: minorHostPhone
fields.label: Número de teléfono de la persona que vaya a acoger al menor o de la entidad de acogida / Telephone number of the host person or hosting entity

fields.name: minorHostEmail
fields.label: Correo electrónico de la persona que vaya a acoger al menor o de la entidad de acogida / E-mail address of the host person or hosting entity

fields.name: minorHostIdNumber
fields.label: Número de Identidad de Extranjero o Documento Nacional de Identidad de la persona que vaya a acoger al menor / Host person's or contact person's NIE or DNI number

fields.name: placeAndDateOfSigning
fields.label: Lugar y fecha / Place and date

documents.label: Fotografia reciente / Recent passport-style photo
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- page 1 header 'FOTO'

documents.label: Documento de viaje / Travel document
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Documento de viaje'

documents.label: Prueba de medios de subsistencia / Evidence of means of subsistence
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Medios de subsistencia'

documents.label: Prueba de alojamiento / Proof of accommodation
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Prueba de alojamiento'

documents.label: Certificado médico / Medical certificate
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Certificado médico'. Listed on the checklist without a stated universal trigger; this cycle could not confirm which purposeOfJourney value(s) make it mandatory, so it is modelled as optional rather than asserting a gate the source does not state.

documents.label: Certificado de antecedentes penales / Certificate of criminal record
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Certificado de antecedentes penales'. Same disclosed scope note as medicalCertificate.

documents.label: Seguro médico de viaje / Travel medical insurance
documents.sourceRef: Solicitud de visado nacional -- 'PARTE RESERVADA A LA ADMINISTRACIÓN' supporting-documents checklist: 'Seguro médico de viaje'. Same disclosed scope note as medicalCertificate.
